zh-TW.title: 感測串流基礎
zh-TW.summary: 建立影像與感測資料進入 Vision AI 系統前的基礎串流管線。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 從感測來源、影像 DMA 與頻寬估算切入，讓學員先掌握資料如何進入系統，為後續影像處理與控制流程打底。
coreContent: 理解 S3 感測介面的資料來源
調整 image DMA 的資料搬運方式
比較 JPEG 品質與頻寬消耗
估算 FPS 與即時性限制

en.title: Sensor Stream Foundations
en.summary: Build the base streaming pipeline before sensor and image data enters the Vision AI system.
en.description: This lesson starts with sensor sources, image DMA, and bandwidth estimation so students understand how data enters the system before moving on to processing and control.
coreContent: Understand the S3 sensor data source
Tune image DMA data movement
Compare JPEG quality with bandwidth usage
Estimate FPS and real-time limits

zh-TW.title: 影像管線
zh-TW.summary: 把串流、畫布與色彩空間整理成一條完整的影像管線。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員理解 MJPEG、video streaming 與 canvas 顯示之間的資料流，並掌握不同色彩空間在前端分析中的角色。
coreContent: 把影像轉成可分析的 HSV 資料
設計 threshold filter 的參數
比較不同濾波演算法的效果
整理可用的特徵抽取結果

en.title: Video Pipeline
en.summary: Organize streaming, canvas rendering, and color spaces into a complete video pipeline.
en.description: This lesson explains the data flow between MJPEG, video streaming, and canvas display while clarifying the role of color spaces in frontend analysis.
coreContent: Build the basic MJPEG streaming flow
Understand image display on canvas
Compare use cases for different color spaces
Confirm the data format between frontend and device

zh-TW.title: 視覺前處理
zh-TW.summary: 從 HSV、閾值與濾波開始建立影像前處理流程。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員把原始影像整理成可分析的特徵資料，理解前處理在 Vision AI 系統中的關鍵位置。
coreContent: 用 Teachable Machine 建立入門模型
理解 MobileNet SSD 的偵測概念
比較 audio 與 speech 的 AI 輔助能力
開始把 AI 感知接入自駕流程

en.title: Vision Preprocessing
en.summary: Start the image preprocessing flow with HSV, thresholding, and filtering.
en.description: This lesson turns raw images into analyzable features and clarifies the role of preprocessing inside a Vision AI system.
coreContent: Convert raw image data into analyzable HSV values
Design threshold filter parameters
Compare filter algorithms and their effects
Organize usable feature-extraction results

zh-TW.title: 追蹤與視覺化
zh-TW.summary: 把追蹤誤差、預視距離與視覺化結果連成可觀測的控制資料。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員把 centroid 與 error 轉換成可追蹤的控制資訊，並用圖表呈現模型與車體反應。
coreContent: 建立 event polling 與資料流概念
把感測、控制與回傳整理成資料管線
用 JSON serialization 準備可傳輸資料

en.title: Tracking Visualization
en.summary: Connect tracking error, look-ahead distance, and visualization into observable control data.
en.description: This lesson turns centroid and error values into trackable control information and uses charts to show model and vehicle response.
coreContent: Use the centroid algorithm to locate the target center
Observe how centroid error affects control
Add look-ahead to improve stability
Visualize tracking results with chart canvas

zh-TW.title: AI 感知入門
zh-TW.summary: 從入門模型開始，建立 AI 感知接入自駕系統的第一步。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 透過 Teachable Machine、MobileNet SSD 與 speech 相關工具，讓學員理解模型感知如何進入自駕主線。
coreContent: 建立可維護的前端 UI 架構
透過 refactoring 整理複雜流程
觀察 system performance 對使用者體驗的影響

en.title: AI Perception Entry
en.summary: Take the first step toward integrating AI perception into the autonomous-driving pipeline with entry-level models.
en.description: This lesson uses Teachable Machine, MobileNet SSD, and speech-related tools to show how model-based perception enters the autonomous-driving path.
coreContent: Create an entry-level model with Teachable Machine
Understand the perception concept behind MobileNet SSD
Compare the support value of audio and speech tools
Begin integrating AI perception into the autonomous-driving flow

zh-TW.title: 感測整合
zh-TW.summary: 整合感測原理、通訊介面與硬體中斷，建立周邊資料層。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員理解不同感測器與控制周邊如何接入系統，並處理即時事件與資料擷取。
coreContent: 把感知誤差轉成數值控制輸入
建立 P control 的基本回路
限制 PWM 輸出避免過度震盪

en.title: Sensor Integration
en.summary: Integrate sensor principles, communication interfaces, and hardware interrupts into the peripheral data layer.
en.description: This lesson shows how sensors and control peripherals connect to the system while handling real-time events and data capture.
coreContent: Understand the data sources from sensors and peripherals
Compare I2C and SPI usage patterns
Handle real-time events with hardware interrupts

zh-TW.title: 事件驅動資料流
zh-TW.summary: 用事件驅動方式整理感測、控制與回傳資料流。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員建立資料管線思維，把 polling、data flow 與 JSON 序列化整理成可擴充的系統結構。
coreContent: 理解 PID 的 P / I / D 三項意義
實作 PID control 並觀察反應
用 simulation 比對不同參數

en.title: Event-Driven Data Flow
en.summary: Organize sensing, control, and feedback flows with an event-driven approach.
en.description: This lesson builds a data-pipeline mindset by turning polling, data flow, and JSON serialization into a scalable system structure.
coreContent: Build the concept of event polling and data flow
Organize sensing, control, and feedback as a data pipeline
Prepare transportable data with JSON serialization

zh-TW.title: 協定與 API 設計
zh-TW.summary: 從 JSON 解析到 REST API，建立可維護的通訊協定。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員把資料交換規格整理成明確的 API contract，讓前後端與裝置端更容易協作。
coreContent: 調整 BLE MTU 以提升傳輸效率
用 notify 回傳 telemetry
把非同步 BLE 流程用於部署收尾

en.title: Protocol and API Design
en.summary: Build maintainable communication protocols from JSON parsing through REST API design.
en.description: This lesson helps students turn data-exchange rules into a clear API contract so frontend, backend, and device code can work together more cleanly.
coreContent: Parse JSON events and control data
Design a REST-style data exchange flow
Organize a maintainable API contract

zh-TW.title: UI 架構
zh-TW.summary: 透過框架、重構與效能調校整理前台 UI 架構。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員不只把功能做出來，也能把介面結構整理得更可維護、更容易擴充。

en.title: UI Architecture
en.summary: Organize the frontend UI architecture through frameworks, refactoring, and performance tuning.
en.description: This lesson helps students not only build features, but also shape the interface into something maintainable and extensible.
coreContent: Build a maintainable frontend UI architecture
Use refactoring to simplify complex flows
Observe how system performance affects UX

zh-TW.title: 指標與溝通
zh-TW.summary: 定義 KPI、除錯證據與技術敘事，讓成果可被驗證與溝通。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員把開發過程中的指標、測試與觀察整理成清楚的技術說明，提升可驗證性與對外溝通能力。

en.title: Metrics and Communication
en.summary: Define KPIs, debugging evidence, and technical narrative so results can be validated and communicated.
en.description: This lesson helps students turn metrics, tests, and observations into clear technical storytelling that improves verification and communication.
coreContent: Define KPIs and verification metrics
Collect debugging artifacts as evidence
Turn technical results into a clear narrative

zh-TW.title: 誤差到控制
zh-TW.summary: 把誤差計算轉成可執行的 P 控制與輸出限制。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員從感知誤差進入控制輸出，學會如何把偏差轉成可操作的控制行為。

en.title: Error to Control
en.summary: Turn error calculation into executable P control and output limits.
en.description: This lesson moves students from perception error into control output and teaches how to convert deviation into actionable control behavior.
coreContent: Convert error calculation into usable control input
Build the basic P control loop
Limit PWM output to avoid overreaction

zh-TW.title: 運動學與閉環
zh-TW.summary: 從速度演算法與幾何關係進入閉環控制。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員把車體運動學與控制回路接起來，理解路徑幾何如何影響實際控制效果。

en.title: Kinematics and Closed Loop
en.summary: Move from speed algorithms and geometry into closed-loop control.
en.description: This lesson links vehicle kinematics with the control loop so students can see how path geometry affects real control behavior.
coreContent: Derive the geometric relationship of speed and turning
Convert motion kinematics into control parameters
Create observation points for the closed loop

zh-TW.title: PID 控制
zh-TW.summary: 把 PID 數學、控制與模擬整合成完整主題。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員理解 P、I、D 三項如何共同影響系統反應，並透過模擬驗證不同參數配置。

en.title: PID Control
en.summary: Integrate PID math, control, and simulation into one complete topic.
en.description: This lesson shows how the P, I, and D terms shape system response and uses simulation to validate different parameter settings.
coreContent: Understand the meaning of P, I, and D terms
Implement PID control and observe the response
Compare different parameters through simulation

zh-TW.title: 穩健性與流程控制
zh-TW.summary: 建立穩健性、流程控制與程式邏輯的收斂策略。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員處理異常狀況與系統穩定性，並把流程與邏輯收斂成更容易維護的架構。

en.title: Robustness and Flow Control
en.summary: Develop robustness, flow control, and code-logic convergence strategies.
en.description: This lesson helps students handle exceptions and stability concerns while shaping flow and logic into a more maintainable structure.
coreContent: Handle edge cases and system stability
Organize flow control and code logic
Build a maintainable expansion strategy

zh-TW.title: BLE 遙測與部署
zh-TW.summary: 以 MTU、通知與非同步 BLE 完成遙測與部署收尾。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 把 BLE 傳輸效能、通知回傳與部署策略整合起來，讓學員能完成最後的 telemetry 與上線準備。

en.title: BLE Telemetry and Deployment
en.summary: Finish telemetry and deployment with MTU, notifications, and async BLE flows.
en.description: This lesson integrates BLE throughput, notify-based feedback, and release strategy so students can complete the final telemetry and rollout preparation.
coreContent: Tune BLE MTU for better throughput
Use notify to return telemetry
Apply async BLE flows to finish rollout
